title: CinebyHub Media Platform
description: A premium streaming and media hub designed for cinematic discovery, custom watchlists, and smart search capabilities. Powered by dynamic APIs and featuring a highly polished layout with smooth transitions, responsive carousels, and dark mode optimizations.
short_description: A high-performance cinematic discovery and streaming platform.

title: Developer Portfolio & Git-Based CMS
description: A state-of-the-art developer showcase and administration portal. Operates as a Git-based CMS that allows editing configuration, developers, and projects directly in JSON files committed via the GitHub API. Features a command palette, light/dark mode, and micro-interactions.
short_description: Git-based CMS and developer showcase built with Next.js 15.
